title: Your Lie in April
sourceNotes: The 22-episode TV anime adapts the COMPLETE manga: 44 chapters across 11 volumes (4 chapters per volume), ending with chapter 44 'Spring Breeze'. Cadence is a clean ~2 chapters per episode (22 x 2 = 44), anchored by near-identical episode/chapter titles. Arc boundaries follow the manga's competition structure; the cumulative ranges are accurate but individual episode boundaries may shift by ~1 chapter where the anime expanded competition sequences. The only film is a 2016 live-action movie (excluded, not anime); the OVA 'Moments' is a childhood side-story (excluded).

mappings.arc: Meeting Kaori / Kousei returns to piano
East Japan Piano Competition (vs. Emi & Takeshi)
Gala concert & relationship arc / Kaori's hospitalization
